raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a complaint regarding an unresolved billing error tied to a XXXX credit account that has now resulted in inaccurate credit reporting and financial harm. 

In XX/XX/year>, I purchased items from XXXX and returned them in full in XX/XX/year>. During the return, the store associate incorrectly processed part of the refund by issuing a gift card instead of returning the funds to my original form of payment. I immediately questioned this, and the associate stated she did not know how to correct it and instructed me to contact Customer Service. 

Since XX/XX/year>, I have made over 12 attempts to resolve this issue through XXXX Customer Service. Despite repeated assurances, no corrective action has been taken. The gift card balance has not been properly applied to my account, and I continue to be billed for a balance that I do not owe. 

This error has now resulted in negative reporting on my credit file, including a balance and accrued interest that should not exist. This has negatively impacted my credit score and financial standing.

I have also visited the store in person and was told they could not assist and that I must continue contacting Customer Service, which has not resolved the issue.
